scripts.vercel-build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:client && npm run merge-builds
scripts.build:admin: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:client: cd frontend-client-ticket && npm install && npm run build
scripts.merge-builds: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/client && cp -r frontend/dist/* dist/ && cp -r frontend-client-ticket/dist/* dist/client/
